payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify the specific fact, preference, task, or event you want remembered.
repair_options: Clarify what “the thing from yesterday” refers to and provide the exact information to remember.
If it was a task or reminder, provide the task details and any relevant date or deadline.
If it was a preference or personal fact, restate the preference/fact explicitly.
If it relates to an earlier conversation, quote or summarize the specific detail you want remembered.
